author: @federicofilippini6780
text: 1:46:48 I don’t think she is mentally disabled, infact having seen practically the majority of her dialogues and situations reguarding her, it’s more to a Tarzan situation, her speech impediment is because of her not having any human to speak with, infact we had irl cases of people like vortex, not being in  contact with humans, Preaty much makes so  that her speech capacity is under developed cause she never had to use the related part of the brain that concerns linguistic speech as in saying the words it’s only natural she would speak that way , but in reguards to intelligence it dosnt exacly effect it. Vortex infact from the interactions she has with other people they are weirdly surprised how smart she can be infact she picks up what is being said real quickly and what she dosnt understand if u explain it to her u kinda don’t need to explain it to her too many times, she is indeed smart, why she behaves like that? Simple she didnt have a society around her just sea creatures natura

author: @muyeong7342
text:
이번영상 융재 공략영상입니다 사실 클리어 할수있는 파티는 제가 생각한거 말고도 여러개가 있습니다 
일단그래도 제가 직접 클리어 한것들을 가지고 얘기 하는게 좋아 보였고 또 운영법 역시 같이 알려드릴수있을거 같아서 이렇게 기획해봤구요
융재 같은경우에는 사실 카드를 어떻게 뽑냐에 따라서 또 운영이 달라지기도 하고 이런 변수들은 있어요 각 보스별 기믹은 별거 없더라도 이 패억까는 진짜 쩔수라....
처음 만들어 보는 융재 공략이다 보니 아무래도 부족한 점이있을수도 있지만 그래도 도움이 되셨으면 좋겠습니다!!!!
그리고 컨텐츠 제작에 도움을 주신 금성경님께 다시한번 감사 인사 드립니다!!!!
video_title: 망각전야Morimens) "융재 1파부터 5파까지! 전 스테이지 핵심 기믹 파훼법 총정리"(1파)
